enrichment.summary: Kyle records a morning-after vlog for November 5th, 2016, explaining his new practice of filming videos the day after events when rested. He discusses his progress mapping Colorado ski resort runs in a project combining Google Earth and Strava, nearly finished with only Beaver Creek and Crested Butte remaining, and gives a live screen-share demo of how the ski run visualization tool works.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Better to film the morning after when rested and clear-headed than late at night when exhausted
Excited to finish and proud of the scope — thousands of Colorado ski runs visualized in Google Earth with Strava segments
